Patch Set 1:

ouch. Make me wonder the performance loses with Lustre's enforced debugging code.

Patch Set 1:

What enforced debugging code?  Adding these values to proc is a *lot* more expensive than just checking a single debug mask value.

parents.subject: LU-15210 tests: fix sanity-lnet to handle duplicate IP

commit.subject: LU-14950 llite: Remove OBD_MALLOC for pages
commit.message:
LU-14950 llite: Remove OBD_MALLOC for pages

The direct i/o code is now efficient enough that tracking
the memory allocation sizes in this code is 5% of the total
CPU time spent.

Since that's a nice-to-have and the cost (as a %) is only
rising as this gets more efficient, let's remove this.

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ib3412fc5f76cf337745d63458239620c1d532d1e
